name: Marcus Wellington
title: Chief Executive Officer & Head of Investments
bio: Visionary leader with 28 years in alternative asset management. Co-founded Sentinel and transformed it into a premier global alternative investor managing $850B in AUM across multiple asset classes. Expert in long-term value creation strategies.

name: Victoria Chen
title: Chief Investment Officer
bio: Leads all investment strategy and portfolio decisions across real estate, credit, and infrastructure. 22 years of investment experience with track record of delivering superior risk-adjusted returns.

name: Richard Pembroke
title: Head of Equity Research
bio: Directs equity research team of 35+ analysts covering 2,000+ global companies. Drives fundamental research that informs portfolio construction and identifies compelling investment opportunities.

name: Amelia Rodriguez
title: Senior Portfolio Manager - Fixed Income
bio: Manages $120B fixed income portfolio with focus on corporate credit and emerging market bonds. 19 years of credit analysis expertise and consistent alpha generation.

name: James Nakamura
title: Portfolio Manager - Equities
bio: Oversees $95B in equity investments with concentration in European and Asian markets. Known for disciplined value-focused approach and multi-decade track record of outperformance.

name: Sophie Bergström
title: Head of Alternative Strategies
bio: Leads hedge fund and derivative strategy teams. 24 years experience in structured finance and alternative investments. Responsible for $180B in AUM across alternative platforms.

name: Daniel O'Brien
title: Managing Director - Private Equity
bio: Directs private equity investment team with focus on mid-market buyouts and growth capital. Engineered portfolio returns averaging 18% IRR over 15-year tenure.

name: Priya Patel
title: Equity Analyst - Technology Sector
bio: Senior analyst covering technology and digital transformation investments. Deep expertise in software, semiconductors, and cloud infrastructure with proprietary research capabilities.

name: Thomas Harris
title: Fixed Income Analyst - Structured Credit
bio: Specializes in complex structured credit and distressed debt analysis. 16 years of experience identifying opportunities in high-yield and distressed credit markets.

name: Katarina Novak
title: Risk Manager
bio: Oversees enterprise risk management and portfolio risk metrics across all strategies. PhD in Financial Engineering with expertise in VaR, stress testing, and derivative pricing.
